title: Equity-Aware Graph Attention Networks for Breast-Cancer Patient-Reported Outcomes
description: Code-only research software for a multi-task Graph Attention Network that models eight EORTC QLQ-C30/BR23 patient-reported outcome scales over a patient-similarity graph, with explainable-AI (SHAP, LIME, GNNExplainer, attention) and algorithmic-fairness auditing across social-determinant strata. No patient data is included. Accompanies the manuscript submitted to the Journal of Biomedical Informatics.
